creator: michiel@vanbaak.eu
text:
Created attachment 241506
0001-net-p2p-prowlarr-Update-to-1.3.2.3006.patch

poudriere ok
runs in production on my setup (13.1 amd64)

Added krb5 to the RUN_DEPENDS because of: libSystem.Net.Security.Native.so is linked to /usr/local/lib/libgssapi_krb5.so.2.2
It's a default module in .NET and cannot be disabled.
